_comment: David's home Record config. Joke-account creds — rotate when you want
real security; make-believe-security frame applies. If you lose the keys,
we just repoint streamo.dev's hostMap at a fresh pubkey.
1. (Optional) swap the password below for something else memorable
2. Create ./david-home/ with whatever files you want in your Record
First run prints your derived pubkey. That pubkey is your Record's
address; share it however you want people to read your Record. The
publish keeps running — any edits in ./david-home/ propagate to the
Record. Ctrl-C to stop. Re-run to resume from the archive.
Joke-account roster (clear periodically when you rotate identity):
